My Booth

⚠ Your booth photos are over 60 days old. Fresh photos help attract customers — consider updating them!

Showcase your booth to customers browsing our website. Add photos or a short video of your booth, write a description of what you offer, and publish it for the world to see.

Not Published
When published, your booth will appear on the public Booths page

Booth Details

0 / 2000

Photos

One shared gallery — these photos power your booth card on the mall page and the hero + gallery on your landing page (if enabled). Add at least one; the first photo is used as the hero banner. Show off your displays, products, and personality. (Max 8 photos, 5MB each)

Click to add photos or drag and drop

JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP — up to 5MB each

Booth Video (Optional)

Add a short video tour of your booth. Keep it under 30 seconds for the best experience. (Max 50MB)

Click to upload a video

MP4, MOV, or WebM — up to 50MB

Vendor Landing Page

$10/mo Add-On

Your own page on the Bowenstreet Market website. Share your link to grow your brand, get found on search engines, and connect with customers directly.

Your landing page is not yet activated. Contact the market office to get started for $10/month.

✨ AI Setup Assistant

Start here

Type a short paragraph about your booth — what you sell, what makes you different, who visits — and I'll draft every text field on this page for you. You'll see each suggestion before anything gets applied, and nothing gets saved until you hit Save on each card.

By default, only empty fields get filled, so existing writing stays safe.

0 / 1500

Draft preview

Step 1 · Page URL

Choose a custom URL for your landing page. This is the link you can share on social media, business cards, etc.

bowenstreetmarket.com/
YOUR PAGE LINK

Photos

One shared gallery powers your booth card on the mall page and the hero + gallery on your landing page. The first photo is used as the hero banner. Changes here sync automatically with your Booth Highlight photos. (Max 8 photos, 5MB each)

Click to add photos or drag and drop

JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP — up to 5MB each

Page Health

Two signals that help your page rank and convert: how original your story is vs. other vendors, and how fresh it is for search engines.

Refresh recommended
    Uniqueness score
    —
    Save your story blocks to see how distinctive your page is.

    Step 2 · Brand Basics

    The short, concrete things that make your booth yours. These feed your hero banner, power SEO, and give the AI better material to work with on the Story and FAQ sections below.

    These appear in your hero kicker, in Google's rich results, and drive internal links to category pages.
    Applies to the AI buttons above.

    Step 3 · Your Story

    Instead of one big "About" paragraph that sounds like every other vendor, answer a few focused questions. Each block becomes its own section on your page with a unique heading — that's what keeps your page from looking the same as the one next to you.

    You don't have to fill in all five. Even two or three well-written blocks beat a generic About paragraph.

    Write my own About paragraph instead (optional)

    By default, the About section is auto-summarized from your Story Blocks. Enable this to write your own opener — your Story Blocks will still appear below.

    0 / 5000

    Step 4 · Contact & Social

    How customers reach you, and which of your social profiles get promoted on your page. Everything here is optional — share only what you're comfortable making public.

    Direct contact
    Social profiles
    Live feed on your page

    Embed your actual social feed so visitors see your latest posts without leaving your page.

    Make sure your Facebook and Instagram URLs above are filled in. Facebook pages must be public for the embed to work.

    Step 5 · SEO & FAQ

    How your page shows up in Google, and the questions real customers search for. Both power discovery — the meta tags shape your search-result snippet, and FAQs fuel "People Also Ask" and AI answers.

    Search engine snippet
    0 / 500
    FAQ section

    Frequently asked questions help search engines understand your page and show up in Google's "People Also Ask" and AI answers. Each Q&A pair should answer something a real customer would search for.

    0 / 8000

    Booth logo

    Optional square logo — appears as a small brand mark in your page's nav bar (and will be used more prominently on the upcoming editorial templates). We'll crop non-square images to center. PNG with transparency works.

    No logo yet
    JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP · max 2MB · cropped to square

    Step 6 · Design

    ✓ Your page is live
    View Page →

    Classic
    Modern
    Boutique
    Boutique
    Minimal
    Editorial
    Editorial Warm
    VOL XIII
    MODERN
    Editorial Modern

    Pick the hero layout that fits your booth. This is the #1 thing visitors see — and the biggest lever for making your page feel unique.

    Classic
    photo + overlay
    Split
    photo + copy
    Editorial
    magazine style
    Collage
    3-tile grid
    · · ·
    Story
    quote + byline
    Carousel
    rotating photos
    Portrait
    headshot + sig
    Drag the cards up or down to change the order sections appear on your public page. Every vendor picks their own order — two pages with the same template will look different.

      ✨ AI Design Assistant

      Tell the AI what vibe you're going for and it will design your page. You can say things like "warm and rustic" or "clean and modern with blue accents."
